text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I took some painkillers, but they're not
cuttin' it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Well, whining about it's not gonna make it heal
faster. The rational thing to do is get some
gaming in and try not to think about it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...You really think you're safe right there? I'll
teach you to underestimate my aim...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Damn, this headache is killing me. I can't
concentrate at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur's headache keeps bothering her for
some time.
